title.en: A Taxonomy of Coexistence: Centralized and Cooperated Methods
title.zh: 共存方法的分类：集中式与协作式

blocks.en: When an IEEE 802.11ah network (Wi-Fi HaLow) and an IEEE 802.15.4g network (a low-power IoT mesh) share the same crowded sub-1 GHz spectrum, they interfere with each other. Clause 8 of IEEE Std 802.19.3-2021 does not yet tell you what to *do* about it — first it builds a vocabulary. It asks two simple questions about any coexistence technique: (1) how much coordination between networks does it need? and (2) how wide is its scope — a whole network, or just a few devices? Those two questions organize everything that follows. A 'coexistence operation' is a concrete action a device or network takes, such as switching channel or scheduling quiet windows.
blocks.zh: 当一个 IEEE 802.11ah 网络（Wi-Fi HaLow）和一个 IEEE 802.15.4g 网络（低功耗物联网网状网）共用拥挤的 Sub-1 GHz 频谱时，它们会相互干扰。IEEE Std 802.19.3-2021 的第 8 章还没有告诉你该“怎么做”，而是先建立一套术语。它对任何一种共存技术都提出两个简单的问题：(1) 它需要网络之间多少协调？(2) 它的作用范围有多大——是整个网络，还是只有少数设备？这两个问题组织起后面的全部内容。所谓“共存操作”，是指设备或网络采取的具体动作，例如切换信道或安排静默窗口。

blocks.en: Clause 8.2 sorts coexistence operations into four categories. (8.2.1) Centralized: a powerful coordinator — for example a hybrid device that can talk to both networks — collects information, analyzes it, makes the decision, and *commands* the networks; the devices themselves decide nothing. (8.2.2) Cooperated (or collaborated): the coordinator is weaker — it only *relays* information between the two networks. Each network then decides for itself; e.g. if 802.11ah moves to a non-overlapping channel, the 802.15.4g side may need no further action. (8.2.3) Distributed network-level: a network senses external interference but does not know its source, so every device in that network performs the same operation (channel switching, RAW scheduling, frequency hopping). (8.2.4) Distributed device-level: a single device acts alone, e.g. deferring its transmission, hybrid CSMA/CA, or changing packet size.
blocks.zh: 第 8.2 节把共存操作分为四类。(8.2.1) 集中式：一个强大的协调器——例如能同时与两个网络通信的混合设备——收集信息、分析信息、做出决策，并“命令”网络执行；设备本身不做任何决策。(8.2.2) 协作式（或协同式）：协调器较弱，只在两个网络之间“转发”信息。随后每个网络自行决策；例如若 802.11ah 切换到不重叠的信道，802.15.4g 一侧可能无需再采取动作。(8.2.3) 分布式网络级：网络感知到外部干扰但不知其来源，于是该网络内所有设备执行相同操作（信道切换、RAW 调度、跳频）。(8.2.4) 分布式设备级：单个设备独立行动，例如推迟发送、混合 CSMA/CA 或改变包长。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[Coexistence operation] --> B{Coordination needed?}
  B -->|Coordinator decides| C[8.2.1 Centralized]
  B -->|Coordinator relays| D[8.2.2 Cooperated]
  B -->|None, whole network| E[8.2.3 Distributed network-level]
  B -->|None, single device| F[8.2.4 Distributed device-level]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[共存操作] --> B{需要协调吗?}
  B -->|协调器决策| C[8.2.1 集中式]
  B -->|协调器转发| D[8.2.2 协作式]
  B -->|无, 整个网络| E[8.2.3 分布式网络级]
  B -->|无, 单个设备| F[8.2.4 分布式设备级]

blocks.en: Clause 8.3 turns those four categories into two orthogonal *models*. The first model (8.3.1) is based on **network coordination**: at the top, coexistence splits into Coordinated (networks work together — covering both Centralized and Cooperated) versus Distributed (no coordination — covering distributed-network and distributed-device). The second model (8.3.2) is based on **scope of coexistence operation**: Network-level coexistence requires every device in a network to do the same thing (e.g. channel switching), while Device-level coexistence lets a group or a single device act differently (e.g. deferring transmission). Standard Figures 9 and 10 draw these two trees.
blocks.zh: 第 8.3 节把这四类归纳为两个正交的“模型”。第一个模型 (8.3.1) 基于**网络协调**：顶层把共存分为协调式（网络协同工作——包含集中式与协作式）与分布式（无协调——包含分布式网络级与分布式设备级）。第二个模型 (8.3.2) 基于**共存操作的作用范围**：网络级共存要求网络中每个设备做同一件事（例如信道切换），而设备级共存允许一组或单个设备采取不同动作（例如推迟发送）。标准的图 9 和图 10 画出了这两棵树。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="160" y="8" width="140" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="27" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Sub-1 GHz coexistence</text><line x1="230" y1="38" x2="120" y2="68"/><line x1="230" y1="38" x2="340" y2="68"/><rect x="55" y="68" width="130" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="120" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Coordinated</text><rect x="275" y="68" width="130" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="340" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Distributed</text><line x1="120" y1="96" x2="60" y2="130"/><line x1="120" y1="96" x2="180" y2="130"/><line x1="340" y1="96" x2="280" y2="130"/><line x1="340" y1="96" x2="400" y2="130"/><rect x="5" y="130" width="110" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="60" y="148" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Centralized 8.2.1</text><rect x="125" y="130" width="110" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="180" y="148" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Cooperated 8.2.2</text><rect x="225" y="130" width="110" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="280" y="148" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Net-level 8.2.3</text><rect x="345" y="130" width="110" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="400" y="148" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Device-level 8.2.4</text></svg>

caption.en: The network-coordination model (Clause 8.3.1, Figure 9): the four coexistence categories of 8.2 grouped under Coordinated vs Distributed.
caption.zh: 网络协调模型（第 8.3.1 节，图 9）：第 8.2 节的四类共存归入协调式与分布式之下。

blocks.en: Clause 9 turns the taxonomy into actual methods and recommendations. Its introduction (9.1) splits methods into Coordinated and Distributed and weighs the trade-off plainly. Coordinated coexistence has *more* information sources (operating channel, network load, data pattern), better accuracy (device count and location), and globalized optimization — but it pays for that with coordinator availability, communication overhead, scalability limits, extra cost/energy, and implementation complexity. Distributed coexistence is the mirror image: easy to implement, low overhead, flexible, low cost — but it suffers from lack of information and purely local decisions. The standard's bottom line: in general, coordinated coexistence should give better performance. This lesson focuses on the coordinated branch.
blocks.zh: 第 9 章把分类落实为具体方法与建议。其引言 (9.1) 把方法分为协调式与分布式，并直白地权衡利弊。协调式共存拥有“更多”的信息来源（工作信道、网络负载、数据模式）、更高的准确性（设备数量与位置）以及全局优化——但代价是协调器可用性、信息获取带来的通信开销、可扩展性限制、额外的成本与能耗，以及实现复杂度。分布式共存恰好相反：易于实现、开销低、灵活、成本低——但缺乏信息、决策纯属局部。标准的结论是：总体而言，协调式共存应当带来更好的性能。本课聚焦协调式这一分支。

blocks.en: Coordinated coexistence (9.2.1) assumes a device — a gateway or hybrid device — that can reach both the 802.11ah AP and the 802.15.4g PANC (the PAN Coordinator that runs the IoT mesh). It generalizes the 802.15.4g CSM mechanism: instead of listening for an enhanced beacon, the AP/PANC listen to the coordinator to learn that other networks exist. They report operating channel after forming and after any switch, may report traffic and network info (device count, density, location), and the coordinator may evaluate channels and feed results back. Coordinated coexistence then divides into two flavors by how capable the coordinator is: Centralized (a powerful coordinator) and Cooperated/collaborated (a limited-function coordinator). The standard also recommends using IEEE Std 802.15.4s-2018 spectrum-measurement features to support this.
blocks.zh: 协调式共存 (9.2.1) 假定存在一个设备——网关或混合设备——既能联系 802.11ah 的 AP，也能联系 802.15.4g 的 PANC（运行物联网网状网的 PAN 协调器）。它是对 802.15.4g CSM 机制的推广：AP/PANC 不再监听增强信标，而是监听协调器来得知其它网络的存在。它们在组网后以及每次切换信道后上报工作信道，可上报流量与网络信息（设备数量、密度、位置），协调器则可评估信道并把结果反馈回来。协调式共存按协调器能力强弱进一步分为两种：集中式（强大的协调器）与协作式（功能有限的协调器）。标准还建议使用 IEEE Std 802.15.4s-2018 的频谱测量特性来支持这一机制。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant AP as 11ah AP
  participant C as Coordinator
  participant P as 15.4g PANC
  Note over AP,P: Centralized (9.2.2) - coordinator decides
  AP->>C: report channel/load/location
  P->>C: report channel/load/location
  C->>AP: command: switch channel / set RAW
  C->>P: command: structure superframe
  Note over AP,P: Cooperated (9.2.3) - coordinator only relays
  AP->>C: my RAW schedule
  C->>P: relay 11ah info
  P->>P: decide superframe locally
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant AP as 11ah AP
  participant C as 协调器
  participant P as 15.4g PANC
  Note over AP,P: 集中式 (9.2.2) - 协调器决策
  AP->>C: 上报信道/负载/位置
  P->>C: 上报信道/负载/位置
  C->>AP: 命令: 切换信道 / 设置 RAW
  C->>P: 命令: 构造超帧
  Note over AP,P: 协作式 (9.2.3) - 协调器仅转发
  AP->>C: 我的 RAW 调度
  C->>P: 转发 11ah 信息
  P->>P: 本地决定超帧

blocks.en: Centralized methods (9.2.2) put a powerful coordinator fully in charge: it collects, analyzes, decides, then commands a network, a group, or a single device. Five operations are typical. **Channel switching** (an entire network changes channel; ideal because the coordinator can assign non-overlapping channels and prevent two networks from racing to the same one — but a free channel is not always available in sub-1 GHz). **RAW + superframe construction**: the coordinator aligns 802.11ah Restricted Access Windows (RAW — scheduled time windows reserved for chosen stations) with the 802.15.4g superframe so high-priority CFP traffic is protected; best when the 802.15.4g network is beacon-enabled. **Beamforming**: the coordinator directs 802.11ah STAs to point beams away from the IoT network — works with beacon- and non-beacon-enabled networks but needs device locations. **Transmission power setting**: dynamic power tweaks (within regulation) can enable TDMA-style access for certain data/geometry patterns, but works poorly for CSMA traffic.
blocks.zh: 集中式方法 (9.2.2) 让强大的协调器全权负责：它收集、分析、决策，然后命令某个网络、一组设备或单个设备。典型的有五种操作。**信道切换**（整个网络更换信道；这是理想方案，因为协调器可分配不重叠信道并防止两个网络抢占同一信道——但 Sub-1 GHz 中并不总有空闲信道可用）。**RAW + 超帧构造**：协调器让 802.11ah 的受限访问窗口（RAW——为选定站点预留的调度时间窗）与 802.15.4g 超帧对齐，从而保护高优先级的 CFP 流量；在 802.15.4g 启用信标时效果最佳。**波束赋形**：协调器引导 802.11ah 站点把波束指向远离物联网网络的方向——对启用与未启用信标的网络都适用，但需要设备位置信息。**发射功率设置**：在法规范围内动态调整功率，在特定数据/几何分布下可实现 TDMA 式接入，但对 CSMA 流量效果不佳。

blocks.en: Cooperated/collaborated methods (9.2.3) keep the same five operations but with a weaker coordinator that only relays. Here the 802.11ah AP and 802.15.4g PANC collect metrics from their own devices — ED ratio (the fraction of energy-detection events above threshold that come from unreadable transmissions), packet delivery ratio, packet latency — exchange them through the coordinator, then each side decides locally whether to act and informs the other afterward. **Cooperated channel switching** can still pick a less-congested channel, but two networks may unknowingly hop to the same one. **Cooperated RAW** lets each network plan its RAW/superframe around the other's, yet simultaneous changes can hurt. **Cooperated beamforming** still works when node positions are known and not closely co-located. **Cooperated transmission power** mostly fails: without centralized scheduling, TDMA between the two networks is hard to realize.
blocks.zh: 协作式（协同式）方法 (9.2.3) 保留同样的五种操作，但协调器较弱、只负责转发。此时 802.11ah 的 AP 与 802.15.4g 的 PANC 各自从本网络设备收集指标——ED 比率（超过门限的能量检测事件中来自不可解调传输的比例）、包投递率、包时延——通过协调器交换，然后各自本地决定是否采取动作，事后再相互告知。**协作式信道切换**仍能选择较空闲的信道，但两个网络可能在不知情下跳到同一信道。**协作式 RAW** 让每个网络围绕对方规划自己的 RAW/超帧，但同时更改可能造成损害。**协作式波束赋形**在节点位置已知且彼此不紧邻时仍然有效。**协作式发射功率**大多失效：没有集中调度，两个网络之间难以实现 TDMA。

blocks.en: Mental shortcut: Centralized = the coordinator gives orders; Cooperated = the coordinator passes notes and each network decides for itself. The set of usable operations (channel switching, RAW/superframe, beamforming, power) is almost the same — what changes is *who* makes the decision and how reliable it is.
blocks.zh: 记忆窍门：集中式＝协调器下达命令；协作式＝协调器只传纸条，各网络自己决定。可用操作的集合（信道切换、RAW/超帧、波束赋形、功率）几乎相同——变的是“谁”做决策以及决策的可靠程度。

summary.en: Coverage map: Clauses 8.1–8.3 and 9.1–9.2, plus the 9.2.4 recommendations table

blocks.en: This lesson teaches all twelve units. Clause 8 (the model): 8.1 Introduction sets the two organizing axes (scope of operation; coordination level). 8.2 sorts operations into four categories — 8.2.1 Centralized (coordinator decides and commands), 8.2.2 Cooperated/collaborated (coordinator relays; each network decides), 8.2.3 Distributed network-level (whole network reacts to unknown interference), 8.2.4 Distributed device-level (a single device acts alone). 8.3 builds two models — 8.3.1 by network coordination (Coordinated vs Distributed; Figure 9) and 8.3.2 by scope of operation (Network-level vs Device-level; Figure 10). Clause 9 (the methods): 9.1 Introduction lists the coordinated-vs-distributed split and its advantages/disadvantages, concluding coordinated generally performs better. 9.2 Coordinated coexistence methods and recommendations — 9.2.1 Introduction (gateway/hybrid coordinator, AP/PANC reporting, the centralized-vs-cooperated split, 802.15.4s recommendation); 9.2.2 Centralized methods (channel switching, RAW+superframe, beamforming, power — subclauses 9.2.2.1–9.2.2.5); 9.2.3 Cooperated/collaborated methods (the same operations under a relay-only coordinator, plus α-Fairness ED-CCA and Q-Learning CSMA/CA, subclauses 9.2.3.1–9.2.3.5); 9.2.4 Recommendations — Table 5 maps each method to the condition under which it is recommended (e.g. centralized channel switching when a less-interfered channel exists; cooperated RAW with a beacon-enabled 802.15.4g network when both loads are known).
blocks.zh: 本课讲授全部十二个单元。第 8 章（模型）：8.1 引言确立两条组织轴（操作范围；协调层级）。8.2 把操作分为四类——8.2.1 集中式（协调器决策并命令）、8.2.2 协作式（协调器转发，各网络决策）、8.2.3 分布式网络级（整个网络对未知干扰作出反应）、8.2.4 分布式设备级（单个设备独立行动）。8.3 建立两个模型——8.3.1 按网络协调（协调式对分布式；图 9）、8.3.2 按操作范围（网络级对设备级；图 10）。第 9 章（方法）：9.1 引言列出协调式与分布式之分及其优缺点，结论是协调式总体性能更好。9.2 协调式共存方法与建议——9.2.1 引言（网关/混合协调器、AP/PANC 上报、集中式与协作式之分、802.15.4s 建议）；9.2.2 集中式方法（信道切换、RAW+超帧、波束赋形、功率——子条款 9.2.2.1–9.2.2.5）；9.2.3 协作式方法（在仅转发的协调器下的同样操作，外加 α 公平 ED-CCA 与 Q 学习 CSMA/CA，子条款 9.2.3.1–9.2.3.5）；9.2.4 建议——表 5 把每种方法映射到推荐使用的条件（例如：存在干扰较小的信道时采用集中式信道切换；在启用信标的 802.15.4g 网络且两侧负载已知时采用协作式 RAW）。

cites.note: Clause 8: 8.1 Introduction, 8.2 coexistence operation (8.2.1-8.2.4), 8.3 coexistence model (8.3.1-8.3.2) with Figures 9 and 10.
Clause 9: 9.1 Introduction (coordinated vs distributed trade-offs); 9.2 coordinated methods - 9.2.1 intro, 9.2.2 centralized, 9.2.3 cooperated, 9.2.4 Table 5 recommendations.
